title: CGI India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: CGI India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
CGI India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
